text:
Their conversation is always
interesting. They are sometimes timid and funky. They feel
shy to exhibit their talents before new audiences. They
specialise in subjects like astrology and become great
upholders of some such cause. Their literary greatness
comes before the world when they are quite young. Unless
the planetary positions are otherwise favourably situated,
people born in this sign will suffer certain critical setbacks
which will jeopardise their reputation. Owing to their
humanitarian doctrines they are prone to be misunderstood.
In family life, they will not have sufficient happiness. They
will be much devoted to their husbands or wives. They are
liable to suffer from colic troubles, chest pain and the like.
They should always be kept happy in life by their husbands
or wives. Otherwise their health will suffer.

Concerning the First House 39
Meena (Pisces) Rising
Mental Tendencies.—Persons born in Pisces are
stubborn, psychically receptive, highly religious, stoical,
